jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Flipkart
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Flipkart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
